contents.text: Spectating a game is possible, and can be done in a few ways. Spectating players are transported to the character select room as usual, but will be unable to join a team or choose a character. Once a match is begun, spectators are put into spectator mode and can freely fly around within the map boundaries.

To become a spectator, players can use the spectator button on the first floor of the lobby to toggle becoming a spectator for the next match. If a player joins the server while a match is in session, then they will automatically become a spectator. Additionally, if there are more players online than the chosen player count, any extra players will automatically become spectators.
